name: Creamy Asparagus and Carrots
recipeIngredient: 2 medium carrots, cut into 1/4 inch slices
1 pound fresh asparagus, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring carrots and water to a boil; cover and cook for 4 minutes.
2. Add asparagus; cover and cook for 3 minutes or until just tender.
3. Drain, reserving liquid; add enough water to the liquid to equal 1/3 cup. Set vegetables aside; return liquid to the skillet.
4. Combine cream cheese, flour, salt, nutmeg, and pepper; add to liquid.
5. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until cheese melts and sauce is bubbly, about 3 minutes.
6. Stir in vegetables and heat through.
7. Garnish with toasted almonds.
